name: pdf
tagline: Official Anthropic production skill for reading, filling, and manipulating PDF files.
verdict: No scope boundaries at all: the description is broad with no 'don't use this for' guidance, so it can hijack unrelated tasks. It also never defines a deliverable format or output location for any of its operations, and its name doesn't even match its own directory.

highlights.summary: Describes many operations but defines no final deliverable format or location for any of them.
The description is very broad and does not specify when NOT to use the skill.
The name 'pdf' does not match the directory name 'pdf-processing' the skill ships under.
